---
title: "Fraxinus — Tree genera"
toc: true
---

{{< include ../_tree-search.qmd >}}

# Species in the genus *Fraxinus* (Ashes)

[Back to Tree Database](../index.html)

## Species summary

| Species | Trees | Planted locations |
|---|---:|---|
| [Ash](/trees/species/ash.html) | 2 | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |

- [*Fraxinus excelsior* Ash](/trees/species/ash.html) — 2 trees

## Planted locations

| Location | Trees |
|---|---:|
| SK: Nature Discovery Garden | 2 |
